sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 23:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 23:1
items.html: The creation of the worlds and their entire contents. He restricted Himself in phase four in Him in order to reveal these worlds down to this world, where it is possible to turn the form of reception into a form of bestowal. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 90 and Inner Observation, item 17)
